javascript:(()%3D%3E%7B%0Aconst%20L%3Dwindow.L%3B%0Aconst%20m%3Dwindow.map%7C%7C(window.animator%26%26window.animator.getMap%26%26window.animator.getMap())%3B%0Aif(!L%7C%7C!m)%7Balert('Flymaster%20My%20Location%3A%20map%20not%20ready.%20Wait%20until%20the%20Flymaster%20map%20is%20visible%2C%20then%20run%20again.')%3Breturn%3B%7D%0Aif(window.fmmlLite%26%26window.fmmlLite.destroy)%20window.fmmlLite.destroy()%3B%0Alet%20watch%3Dnull%2Cfollow%3Dfalse%2Clast%3Dnull%2Cpts%3D%5B%5D%3B%0Aconst%20layer%3DL.layerGroup().addTo(m)%3B%0Aconst%20track%3DL.polyline(%5B%5D%2C%7Bcolor%3A'%231a73e8'%2Cweight%3A3%2Copacity%3A.85%2Cinteractive%3Afalse%7D).addTo(layer)%3B%0Alet%20marker%3Dnull%2Ccircle%3Dnull%3B%0Aconst%20style%3Ddocument.createElement('style')%3B%0Astyle.textContent%3D'.fmmlp%7Bbackground%3A%23ffffffe8%3Bpadding%3A8px%3Bborder%3A2px%20solid%20%231a73e8%3Bborder-radius%3A8px%3Bbox-shadow%3A0%202px%2010px%20%230005%3Bfont%3A13px%20system-ui%2Csans-serif%3Bmax-width%3A250px%7D.fmmlp%20button%7Bmargin%3A3px%203px%200%200%3Bpadding%3A5px%207px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23888%3Bborder-radius%3A6px%3Bbackground%3Awhite%7D.fmmlw%7Bbackground%3A0%3Bborder%3A0%7D.fmmld%7Bwidth%3A28px%3Bheight%3A28px%3Bborder-radius%3A50%25%3Bbackground%3A%231a73e8%3Bborder%3A3px%20solid%20white%3Bbox-shadow%3A0%201px%207px%20%230008%3Bposition%3Arelative%7D.fmmld%3Aafter%7Bcontent%3A%22%22%3Bposition%3Aabsolute%3Bleft%3A8px%3Btop%3A8px%3Bwidth%3A6px%3Bheight%3A6px%3Bborder-radius%3A50%25%3Bbackground%3Awhite%7D.fmmla%7Bposition%3Aabsolute%3Bleft%3A9px%3Btop%3A-13px%3Bwidth%3A0%3Bheight%3A0%3Bborder-left%3A5px%20solid%20%230000%3Bborder-right%3A5px%20solid%20%230000%3Bborder-bottom%3A16px%20solid%20%231a73e8%3Btransform-origin%3A50%25%2027px%7D'%3B%0Adocument.head.appendChild(style)%3B%0Aconst%20C%3DL.Control.extend(%7BonAdd()%7B%0Aconst%20d%3DL.DomUtil.create('div'%2C'fmmlp%20leaflet-bar')%3B%0Ad.innerHTML%3D'%3Cb%20id%3D%22fmmls%22%3EMy%20location%3C%2Fb%3E%3Cdiv%20id%3D%22fmmld%22%3Estarting%20GPS%E2%80%A6%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3Cbutton%20id%3D%22fmmlc%22%3ECenter%3C%2Fbutton%3E%3Cbutton%20id%3D%22fmmlf%22%3EFollow%3A%20off%3C%2Fbutton%3E%3Cbutton%20id%3D%22fmmlx%22%3EStop%3C%2Fbutton%3E'%3B%0AL.DomEvent.disableClickPropagation(d)%3BL.DomEvent.disableScrollPropagation(d)%3B%0Ad.querySelector('%23fmmlc').onclick%3D()%3D%3Elast%26%26m.setView(%5Blast.lat%2Clast.lon%5D%2CMath.max(m.getZoom()%2C15))%3B%0Ad.querySelector('%23fmmlf').onclick%3De%3D%3E%7Bfollow%3D!follow%3Be.target.textContent%3D'Follow%3A%20'%2B(follow%3F'on'%3A'off')%3Bif(follow%26%26last)m.panTo(%5Blast.lat%2Clast.lon%5D)%3B%7D%3B%0Ad.querySelector('%23fmmlx').onclick%3D()%3D%3Ewindow.fmmlLite.destroy()%3B%0Areturn%20d%3B%0A%7D%7D)%3B%0Aconst%20ctl%3Dnew%20C(%7Bposition%3A'topleft'%7D).addTo(m)%3B%0Aconst%20dist%3D(a%2Cb%2Cc%2Cd)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20R%3D6371000%2Cp%3DMath.PI%2F180%2Cx%3D(c-a)*p%2Cy%3D(d-b)*p%2CA%3DMath.sin(x%2F2)**2%2BMath.cos(a*p)*Math.cos(c*p)*Math.sin(y%2F2)**2%3Breturn%20R*2*Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(A)%2CMath.sqrt(1-A))%3B%7D%3B%0Aconst%20bear%3D(a%2Cb%2Cc%2Cd)%3D%3E%7Bconst%20p%3DMath.PI%2F180%2Cy%3DMath.sin((d-b)*p)*Math.cos(c*p)%2Cx%3DMath.cos(a*p)*Math.sin(c*p)-Math.sin(a*p)*Math.cos(c*p)*Math.cos((d-b)*p)%3Breturn(Math.atan2(y%2Cx)*180%2FMath.PI%2B360)%25360%3B%7D%3B%0Aconst%20icon%3Dh%3D%3EL.divIcon(%7BclassName%3A'fmmlw'%2CiconSize%3A%5B34%2C34%5D%2CiconAnchor%3A%5B17%2C17%5D%2Chtml%3A%60%3Cdiv%20class%3Dfmmld%3E%3Cdiv%20class%3Dfmmla%20style%3D%22transform%3Arotate(%24%7BisFinite(h)%3Fh%3A0%7Ddeg)%3Bopacity%3A%24%7BisFinite(h)%3F1%3A.25%7D%22%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%7D)%3B%0Afunction%20ok(p)%7B%0Aconst%20c%3Dp.coords%2Cn%3D%7Blat%3Ac.latitude%2Clon%3Ac.longitude%2Cacc%3Ac.accuracy%7C%7C0%2Chead%3AisFinite(c.heading)%3Fc.heading%3ANaN%2Cspeed%3AisFinite(c.speed)%3Fc.speed%3ANaN%7D%3B%0Aif(!isFinite(n.head)%26%26last%26%26dist(last.lat%2Clast.lon%2Cn.lat%2Cn.lon)%3E3)n.head%3Dbear(last.lat%2Clast.lon%2Cn.lat%2Cn.lon)%3B%0Alast%3Dn%3B%0Aconst%20ll%3D%5Bn.lat%2Cn.lon%5D%3B%0Aif(!marker)%7Bmarker%3DL.marker(ll%2C%7Bicon%3Aicon(n.head)%2CzIndexOffset%3A5000%2Ctitle%3A'My%20location'%7D).addTo(layer)%3B%7Delse%7Bmarker.setLatLng(ll)%3Bmarker.setIcon(icon(n.head))%3B%7D%0Aif(!circle)%7Bcircle%3DL.circle(ll%2C%7Bradius%3An.acc%2Ccolor%3A'%231a73e8'%2Cweight%3A2%2Copacity%3A.65%2CfillColor%3A'%231a73e8'%2CfillOpacity%3A.12%2Cinteractive%3Afalse%7D).addTo(layer)%3B%7Delse%7Bcircle.setLatLng(ll)%3Bcircle.setRadius(n.acc)%3B%7D%0Aconst%20lp%3Dpts%5Bpts.length-1%5D%3B%0Aif(!lp%7C%7Cdist(lp%5B0%5D%2Clp%5B1%5D%2Cn.lat%2Cn.lon)%3E8)%7Bpts.push(ll)%3Bif(pts.length%3E500)pts.shift()%3Btrack.setLatLngs(pts)%3B%7D%0Aif(follow)m.panTo(ll%2C%7Banimate%3Afalse%7D)%3B%0Aconst%20sp%3DisFinite(n.speed)%3F'%20%C2%B7%20'%2B(n.speed*3.6).toFixed(0)%2B'%20km%2Fh'%3A''%3B%0Adocument.getElementById('fmmls').textContent%3D'My%20location%3A%20live'%3B%0Adocument.getElementById('fmmld').textContent%3Dn.lat.toFixed(5)%2B'%2C%20'%2Bn.lon.toFixed(5)%2B'%20%C2%B1'%2BMath.round(n.acc)%2B'%20m'%2Bsp%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20err(e)%7Bdocument.getElementById('fmmls').textContent%3D'My%20location%3A%20error'%3Bdocument.getElementById('fmmld').textContent%3De.message%7C%7CString(e)%3B%7D%0Aif(!navigator.geolocation)%7Berr(%7Bmessage%3A'Geolocation%20not%20supported'%7D)%3Breturn%3B%7D%0Awatch%3Dnavigator.geolocation.watchPosition(ok%2Cerr%2C%7BenableHighAccuracy%3Atrue%2CmaximumAge%3A1000%2Ctimeout%3A15000%7D)%3B%0Awindow.fmmlLite%3D%7Bdestroy()%7Bif(watch!%3Dnull)navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(watch)%3Bm.removeControl(ctl)%3Bm.removeLayer(layer)%3Bstyle.remove()%3Bdelete%20window.fmmlLite%3B%7D%7D%3B%0A%7D)()%3B
